info.name: Coremail Sync Bridge
info.summary: Bring Coremail contact and calendar data into Nextcloud
info.description:
🏢 **About Coremail**
Coremail is an enterprise email system that delivers stable, secure, and efficient email communication. Built on proprietary mail protocol, it ensures high-performance, data control, robust security, and seamless collaboration across industries - an ideal solution for organizations seeking an affordable alternative to Exchange.
📩 **Bring Coremail into Nextcloud**
Coremail Sync bridge helps organizations using both Coremail and Nextcloud access Coremail contact and calendar data directly inside native Nextcloud apps. It is designed for teams that use Coremail as their enterprise email system and Nextcloud as their collaboration workspace, helping users work with email, schedules, and address books in one environment.
✨ **Key features**
- Sync Coremail calendars into Nextcloud Calendar
- Sync Coremail contacts into Nextcloud Contacts
- Access schedules and address books from the Nextcloud interface
- Run synchronization automatically or manually
- Configure the Coremail DAV endpoint
- Allow users to connect their own Coremail account for synchronization
The current version focuses on reliable synchronization from Coremail to Nextcloud. Changes made in Coremail can be synchronized into Nextcloud.
👥 **Who is this for?**
Coremail Sync is built for organizations that use Coremail for enterprise communication and Nextcloud for collaboration, files, or workspace services. It reduces context switching and helps users work with Coremail data inside familiar Nextcloud interfaces.
✅ **Before you start**
Please install and enable the official Nextcloud [Calendar](https://apps.nextcloud.com/apps/calendar) and [Contacts](https://apps.nextcloud.com/apps/contacts) apps before using Coremail Sync Bridge.
info.author: Coremail
